$schema.description: Pointer to the dv config schema for editor autocomplete (e.g. ./specs/schemas/config.json or a published URL).

extends.description: Local path(s) to base configs, merged first-to-last. Top-level only; HTTPS sources are not supported in v1.

plugins.description: Plugin assignments. The sole source of truth for which paths are Packages.

match.description: A glob or list of globs (gitignore-style negation with '!').

use.description: Path to a plugin executable (./..., /..., ~/...) or a builtin name.

timeout.description: Max wall-clock for this plugin's fast ops (discover, read-version, write-version, update-dependency). Default 60s.
timeout.title: Duration

items.title: Plugin assignment
items.description: Binds a glob of paths to the plugin that manages them.

use-gitignore.description: Honor .gitignore during discovery — ignored paths are skipped. Default true.

discovery.title: Discovery subtool
discovery.description: Enumerates Packages and resolves which Plugin manages each (specs/config-format.md § discovery).

auto-stage.description: `git add` the Record file created by `dv add`. Default true.

records.title: Records subtool
records.description: Authoring, parsing, and validation of Records (specs/cli.md § dv add).

format.description: CHANGELOG output format. v1 supports only 'keep-a-changelog'.

location.description: Template for each Package's CHANGELOG path. Supports {package}, {version}, {package-path}.

changelog.title: Changelog subtool
changelog.description: How rendered CHANGELOG files are written (specs/config-format.md § changelog).

enabled.description: Write a long-form HISTORY.md companion to CHANGELOG.md. Default false.

location.description: Template for each Package's HISTORY path. Supports {package}, {version}, {package-path}.

history.title: History subtool
history.description: How rendered HISTORY files are written (specs/config-format.md § history). HISTORY carries each Record's full body prose under h3 subsections, grouped by version. Opt-in: dv defaults to CHANGELOG-only.

format.description: Template for git tags. Default '{package}@{version}'. Supports {package}, {version}, {package-path}.

tagging.title: Tagging subtool
tagging.description: How per-Package git Tags are formatted (specs/config-format.md § tagging).

plugin.description: Executable invoked per Package after tagging (the release Op).

timeout.description: Max wall-clock for the release Op. Default 'none' — publishing is slow and variable.

publishing.title: Publishing subtool
publishing.description: How release plugins are invoked after tagging (specs/config-format.md § publishing).

require-clean-tree.description: Refuse `dv version` / `dv release` with uncommitted changes. Default true.

sign.description: Commit/tag signing. 'auto' honors git's own config; true/false force or disable.

auto-commit.description: Commit the changes `dv version` produces. Default true; --no-commit overrides.

commit-message-template.description: Template for the auto-commit message. Supports {summary} and {details}.

auto-push.description: Push minted tags during `dv release`. Default false; --push overrides.

push-sequence.description: Order of operations when pushing is enabled. Default 'publish-then-push'.

git.title: Git substrate
git.description: Shared git behavior used by every subtool (specs/config-format.md § git).

dry-run-by-default.description: Flip destructive commands to --dry-run unless --no-dry-run is passed. Default false.

overrides.description: Per-Package overrides. First match wins; order most-specific to least-specific.

match.description: A glob or list of globs (gitignore-style negation with '!').

format.description: CHANGELOG output format. v1 supports only 'keep-a-changelog'.

location.description: Template for each Package's CHANGELOG path. Supports {package}, {version}, {package-path}.

changelog.title: Changelog subtool
changelog.description: How rendered CHANGELOG files are written (specs/config-format.md § changelog).

enabled.description: Write a long-form HISTORY.md companion to CHANGELOG.md. Default false.

location.description: Template for each Package's HISTORY path. Supports {package}, {version}, {package-path}.

history.title: History subtool
history.description: How rendered HISTORY files are written (specs/config-format.md § history). HISTORY carries each Record's full body prose under h3 subsections, grouped by version. Opt-in: dv defaults to CHANGELOG-only.

format.description: Template for git tags. Default '{package}@{version}'. Supports {package}, {version}, {package-path}.

tagging.title: Tagging subtool
tagging.description: How per-Package git Tags are formatted (specs/config-format.md § tagging).

plugin.description: Executable invoked per Package after tagging (the release Op).

timeout.description: Max wall-clock for the release Op. Default 'none' — publishing is slow and variable.

publishing.title: Publishing subtool
publishing.description: How release plugins are invoked after tagging (specs/config-format.md § publishing).

plugin-use.description: Override the plugin assignment for matched Packages.

items.title: Override entry
items.description: First-match-wins per-Package override of a subset of settings.

title: dv config (.changelog/config.yaml)
description: Subtool-organized configuration for dv. Keys are kebab-case. See specs/config-format.md.
